title: MStack360 CRM System
summary: End-to-end CRM system managing clients, projects, freelancers, and financial operations in one unified platform.
impact: Centralized client, project, and freelancer management into a single system.
Automated invoice generation and email communication workflows.
Improved visibility on financials, payments, and project performance.
longDescription:
I designed and developed a custom CRM system for MStack360, a freelance-based company where employees operate as freelancers and clients are primarily technical organizations. The solution centralizes the management of clients, employees, projects, tasks, leads, and financial operations into a single unified platform, enabling efficient tracking of work, payments, and client relationships.

The system includes a comprehensive Client Management module providing a 360° view of each client, including project history, active work, payments, and follow-ups. Users can generate invoices directly from the application by adding line items, after which a Power Automate workflow automatically creates a professionally formatted PDF invoice and sends it via email. The platform also integrates a built-in HTML email system to send customized communications to clients.

In addition, the solution features Employee Management, allowing tracking of freelancer performance, workload, payments, and assigned projects. A structured Projects & Tasks module supports milestone tracking and operational follow-up, while the Finance module provides visibility on payments received, payments due, and overall financial status. The system also includes a Follow-Up module to manage client communication and an integrated dashboard to visualize business activity.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, and SharePoint, the CRM significantly reduces manual work, improves operational visibility, and provides a scalable foundation for managing freelance-based business operations.

title: Executive Operations & Performance Dashboard
summary: Executive dashboard providing end-to-end visibility on contract lifecycle, performance, and operational efficiency.
impact: Enabled leadership to monitor contract pipeline, approvals, and performance in real time.
Identified operational bottlenecks through cycle time and phase analysis.
Provided actionable insights on team performance, deadlines, and conversion rates.
longDescription:
I developed an Executive Operations & Performance Dashboard for Federon Procurement Solutions to provide leadership with full visibility into contract lifecycle performance, operational efficiency, and team productivity. The dashboard centralizes data from the contract management system and transforms it into actionable insights across multiple dimensions of the business.

The solution includes multiple analytical views such as pipeline tracking, conversion funnels, team performance, deadline risk monitoring, and operational bottleneck analysis. It enables stakeholders to understand how contracts move through different phases, identify delays, measure approval rates, and evaluate workload distribution across teams and individuals.

The dashboard also provides predictive and performance-driven insights, including approval rates, expected pipeline outcomes, and urgency-based prioritization. Advanced filtering capabilities allow users to analyze data by partner, specialist, category, contract type, and time period, supporting both high-level strategic decisions and detailed operational analysis.

Built using Power BI and Dataverse, the solution transforms raw operational data into a structured, visual, and decision-oriented platform, significantly improving transparency, accountability, and performance management across the organization.

title: Contract Lifecycle Management System
summary: Enterprise contract management platform centralizing procurement workflows from discovery to submission.
impact: Centralized contract operations and reduced reliance on emails and spreadsheets.
Implemented structured workflow across multiple roles (discovery, partner, specialist, submission).
Enabled real-time tracking and reporting of contract lifecycle and team performance.
longDescription:
I am currently developing a Contract Lifecycle Management System for Federon Procurement Solutions, designed to centralize and digitize complex procurement workflows across multiple teams. The platform integrates external contract data into a unified system and manages the full operational lifecycle from initial discovery through internal evaluation, assignment, and submission processes.

The solution supports a structured, role-based workflow involving discovery teams, partners, specialists, and submission teams. Contracts are tracked through multiple stages, enabling clear visibility of their status, ownership, and progression. The system ensures that all actions, updates, and decisions are recorded within a centralized platform, reducing dependency on manual communication and disconnected tools.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, and Power BI, the platform provides role-based interfaces, automated workflows, and real-time dashboards to enhance operational transparency and decision-making. The ongoing vision of the system is to evolve into a fully integrated operations platform, further centralizing procurement activities, performance tracking, and reporting across the entire contract lifecycle.
images: Contract Line Items and Gant Chart.png

title: ASU Employment Fair Registration System
summary: End-to-end event registration and QR-based verification system handling 15,000+ participants.
impact: Managed registration and attendance tracking for over 15,000 participants.
Replaced manual Excel-based processes with a fully automated digital system.
Enabled real-time analytics, filtering, and targeted communication during and after the event.
longDescription:
I developed a smart registration and event management system for the ASU Career Center, designed to handle over 15,000 participants during the Employment Fair. The solution replaced manual Excel-based processes with a fully automated and centralized digital system, improving efficiency, accuracy, and real-time visibility across event operations.

Participants registered through an online form, triggering an automated workflow that generated a unique QR code and sent it via a professionally designed email. During the event, volunteers used a mobile Power Apps application to scan QR codes or search participants using identifiers such as phone number or ID, enabling fast and accurate attendance tracking. The system also supported workshop access control with capacity limitations.

An administrative interface allowed organizers to manage workshops and monitor operations through an interactive dashboard, providing real-time insights before, during, and after the event. Users could filter participant data, export results, and send targeted communications directly from the system. Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, Power BI, Google Sheets, and App Script, the solution significantly improved event management efficiency and enabled data-driven decision-making.

title: Employee Recognition & Nomination Platform
summary: Digital nomination platform streamlining employee recognition with role-based workflows and modern UI/UX.
impact: Digitized and streamlined the employee nomination and recognition process.
Improved user engagement through a modern and intuitive UI/UX experience.
Automated multi-stage approval workflow and communication across HR and management.
longDescription:
I developed an Employee Recognition and Nomination platform for Nestlé to digitize and streamline the process of recognizing employee achievements across the organization. The application allows users to nominate colleagues through a guided multi-step experience, capturing nominator details, nominee information, nomination context, and supporting documents in a structured and user-friendly way.

The solution features a role-based workflow involving nominators, HR teams, and management, enabling efficient review, decision-making, and communication. HR can evaluate nominations, provide feedback through threaded comments, and approve submissions, after which nominees receive automated notifications and can contribute additional content such as supporting videos. The process continues through management review, where final decisions are made across different recognition categories.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, and SharePoint, the platform emphasizes a modern UI/UX design, providing a smooth, engaging, and intuitive user experience. The system centralizes the entire nomination lifecycle, enhances transparency, and improves participation in employee recognition programs.

title: AI-Powered HR & ATS Automation System
summary: AI-driven recruitment system automating CV screening, candidate ranking, and HR workflows.
impact: Automated CV screening and keyword extraction using AI Builder.
Reduced manual recruitment effort through dynamic candidate filtering and ranking.
Enabled personalized communication with candidates through automated email workflows.
longDescription:
I developed an AI-powered HR system prototype to demonstrate how recruitment and HR processes can be fully automated using Microsoft Power Platform. The solution includes a complete Applicant Tracking System (ATS) that allows recruiters to create job postings, collect candidate applications through online forms, and manage the recruitment pipeline in a structured and efficient way.

Candidate applications and CVs are automatically processed using Power Automate and AI Builder, which extract key information and relevant skills from uploaded CVs and store them in a structured format. Recruiters can then review candidates through a PowerApps interface, filter applicants by criteria such as degree level or keywords, and prioritize candidates based on AI-driven relevance. The system also allows viewing CVs directly within the application and managing candidate progression through different recruitment stages.

The platform includes automated communication workflows, sending personalized HTML emails to candidates, including interview invitations for selected applicants and detailed feedback for rejected candidates. In addition, a payroll module is integrated to track working hours, calculate compensation, and automate salary notifications. Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, AI Builder, and SharePoint, this project demonstrates how HR operations can be transformed into a scalable, automated, and data-driven system.

title: Quality Tracking & Ticket Management System
summary: End-to-end ticketing system centralizing issue tracking, resolution workflows, and performance monitoring.
impact: Centralized issue tracking and eliminated reliance on emails and manual follow-ups.
Automated ticket lifecycle with role-based workflows and notifications.
Enabled real-time monitoring of ticket performance and resolution rates through dashboards.
longDescription:
I developed a Quality Tracking and Ticket Management system for Nestlé to centralize and streamline the process of reporting, tracking, and resolving operational issues across teams. The platform allows employees to submit tickets with detailed information and attachments, after which each ticket is automatically assigned a unique reference number and routed to the responsible processor through automated workflows.

The system manages the full ticket lifecycle, including issue investigation, root cause analysis, managerial review, and requester validation or escalation. All communications and actions are handled within the application, supported by automated HTML email notifications with deep linking to ensure seamless user interaction and follow-up. Scheduled reminders are also implemented to notify stakeholders when tickets remain pending beyond defined timeframes.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, and Power BI, the solution provides role-based views for requesters, processors, managers, and administrators, along with dashboards that offer real-time insights into ticket volume, resolution performance, and team activity. The system improves operational transparency, accountability, and efficiency while delivering a structured and scalable issue management process.

title: Internal Operations Applications
summary: Developed internal apps for learning management and procurement tracking used across enterprise teams.
impact: Improved access to training programs for over 2,500 employees.
Streamlined procurement tracking and approval workflows.
Enabled better operational visibility through centralized applications.
longDescription:
During my time at Orange Business, I developed two PowerApps solutions aimed at improving internal operations and supporting data-driven decision-making across teams. The first solution, MSC Learning Studio, was designed for the Learning & Development function to provide more than 2,500 employees with a centralized platform to access training programs, learning resources, and development opportunities in a structured and user-friendly way.

The second solution, Global PO Tracker, focuses on procurement operations by enabling teams to track purchase orders, monitor their status, and follow approval workflows in real time. The system reduces reliance on manual tracking and improves coordination between different stakeholders involved in the procurement process.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, and Excel, these applications enhanced operational efficiency, improved visibility on internal processes, and contributed to a more structured and scalable way of managing learning and procurement activities within the organization.

title: Inventory Management System
summary: Inventory tracking system managing stock levels, product transformation, and sales operations.
impact: Enabled real-time tracking of inventory and stock levels.
Improved visibility on product lifecycle from raw materials to finished goods.
Centralized transaction tracking for purchases, production, and sales.
longDescription:
I developed an inventory management system for Bondy to track product transactions, stock levels, and the transformation of raw materials into finished goods. The solution monitors the full inventory lifecycle, from purchasing garments as raw materials to converting them into final products and tracking their sales.

The application provides real-time visibility into stock levels, current inventory value, and the availability of both packaging materials and finished products. It centralizes all inventory-related operations, including purchases, production, and sales transactions, ensuring accurate and up-to-date tracking.

Built using Power Apps and Power Automate, the system improves operational visibility and enables more efficient management of inventory and supply chain activities.

title: Internal E-Commerce & Inventory System
summary: Internal store system managing customers, orders, inventory, and financial tracking.
impact: Automated purchasing process with real-time inventory updates.
Integrated order management with invoice generation and email notifications.
Centralized financial tracking with transaction history and reporting.
longDescription:
I developed an internal digital store system designed to manage purchasing, inventory, and financial tracking within a centralized platform. The solution allows users to create accounts, browse available products, add items to a cart, and complete purchases directly within the application, with automated email notifications and PDF invoice generation.

The system also includes an administrative interface for managing products, updating stock levels, and monitoring customer activity. Inventory is automatically updated based on purchases, ensuring real-time stock accuracy. Administrators can also track top customers, monitor product performance, and analyze transaction data.

In addition, the application records all financial activities in an accounting-style journal, capturing incoming and outgoing transactions, payments, and revenue. Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, and Excel, the project demonstrates a complete end-to-end system covering customer management, order processing, inventory control, and financial tracking.

title: Change Request Management System
summary: Workflow-driven system managing change requests from submission to approval and implementation.
impact: Structured and standardized change request lifecycle across multiple stakeholders.
Automated communication and approval workflows, reducing manual coordination.
Improved transparency and tracking of requests through dashboards and status monitoring.
longDescription:
I developed a Change Request Management system for RATP Dev to digitize and streamline the process of handling internal system updates, issues, and improvement requests. The platform allows employees to submit change requests, including bugs, enhancements, or recommendations, which are then tracked through a structured and centralized workflow.

The system manages the full lifecycle of each request, starting with technical assessment, followed by potential budget evaluation, and progressing through business approval before implementation. Once completed, stakeholders are notified, ensuring clear communication and accountability throughout the process.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, and SharePoint, the solution includes automated workflows, role-based interactions, and dashboards that provide real-time visibility into request status and operational performance. The system improves efficiency, reduces reliance on manual coordination, and ensures a more transparent and controlled change management process.

title: Smart Interview Scheduling System
summary: Automated interview scheduling with dynamic time slots and integrated Outlook & Teams invitations.
impact: Automated interview scheduling with dynamic availability-based time slots.
Integrated Outlook and Teams to create meetings and send professional invitations.
Enhanced candidate experience through structured and branded communication.
longDescription:
I developed a smart interview scheduling system to demonstrate how recruitment processes can be streamlined while enhancing candidate experience and employer branding. The application allows recruiters to select candidates, define interview duration, and generate available time slots dynamically based on working hours and availability.

Once a time slot is selected, the system automatically creates a meeting integrated with Outlook and Microsoft Teams and sends a professionally designed HTML invitation to the candidate. The process is fully automated and can be completed in just a few clicks, eliminating manual coordination and scheduling effort.

Built using Power Apps, Power Automate, Outlook, and Microsoft Teams integration, the solution highlights how simple automation can significantly improve recruitment efficiency and deliver a more professional and structured communication experience.

title: Automated Certificate Generation System
summary: Automated system generating and sending personalized certificates at scale using dynamic templates.
impact: Eliminated manual certificate creation and email sending processes.
Enabled scalable generation of personalized PDF certificates.
Delivered consistent and professional branded communication experience.
longDescription:
I designed and developed an automated certificate generation system to streamline the process of creating and sending personalized certificates at scale. The solution uses a structured Excel file as a data source, where each row represents a recipient, including their name and email address.

Using Power Automate, the system reads the data, dynamically injects recipient information into a professionally designed HTML certificate template, and generates a PDF-ready document for each individual. The process is fully automated, allowing certificates to be created consistently without any manual editing or formatting.

The workflow also sends personalized HTML emails to each recipient, attaching their certificate and delivering a cohesive, branded communication experience. Built using Power Automate, Excel, and HTML/CSS, the solution transforms a repetitive manual process into a scalable and efficient automation while maintaining a high level of design quality and professionalism.

title: Interactive Financial Dashboard
summary: Dynamic financial dashboard with automated tracking, interactive charts, and real-time data updates.
impact: Built a fully dynamic dashboard with real-time updates based on user input.
Automated data handling and reporting using VBA and Excel forms.
Delivered clear financial insights through interactive charts and KPI tracking.
longDescription:
I developed an interactive financial dashboard in Excel to track income, expenses, and overall financial performance in a dynamic and automated way. The solution includes multiple visual components such as income and expense tracking, profit analysis with highlighted peak values, net revenue comparison, and goal tracking indicators.

The dashboard is fully dynamic, with data entered through forms and automatically reflected across all visualizations in real time. It leverages Pivot Tables, slicers, and interactive charts to provide a clear and structured overview of financial data, enabling better analysis and decision-making.

To enhance automation, I implemented VBA and Excel forms to streamline data input and processing, reducing manual effort and ensuring data consistency. This project demonstrates how Excel can be transformed into a powerful reporting and visualization tool capable of delivering advanced analytics without relying on external BI platforms.
